member.name: T:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder
member.summary: A ConfigurationProvider that retrieves values from Azure App Configuration stores.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.Endpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the Uri of the config store to connect to.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.ConnectionString
member.summary: Alternative to the preferred , gets or sets a connection string used to connect to the config store.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.KeyFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets a 'Key Filter' to use when searching for config values.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.LabelFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets a 'Label Filter' to restrict the set of config values searched.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.AcceptDateTime
member.summary: Gets or sets a 'DateTime Filter' to query for config state as it existed at the given time.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.UseAzureKeyVault
member.summary: Specifies whether this builder is allowed to connect to Azure Key Vault for chained secret lookup. (Default: false)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.LazyInitialize(System.String,System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection)
member.param: The friendly name of the provider.
A collection of the name/value pairs representing builder-specific attributes specified in the configuration for this provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.ValidateKey(System.String)
member.summary: Makes a determination about whether the input key is valid for this builder and backing store.
member.param: The string to be validated. May be partial.
member.returns: True if the string is valid. False if the string is not a valid key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.GetValue(System.String)
member.summary: Looks up a single 'value' for the given 'key.'
member.param: The 'key' for the secret to look up in the configured Key Vault. (Prefix handling is not needed here.)
member.returns: The value corresponding to the given 'key' or null if no value is found.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.GetAllValues(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all known key/value pairs from the Azure App Config store where the key begins with with .
member.param: A prefix string to filter the list of potential keys retrieved from the source.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.GetCredential
member.summary: Gets a to authenticate with App Configuration. This defaults to .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilders.AzureAppConfigurationBuilder.GetConfigurationClientOptions
member.summary: Gets a to initialize the Key Vault SecretClient with. This defaults to a new .
